headline: Will American International Group (AIG) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: American International Group (AIG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on American International Gr, Lowers Price Target to $78
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $79 to $78.
